title: Find My Device - Warning dialog for Play button
scenario: Find My Device warning dialog does not match Figma design when Play button is clicked
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the device name to go to Device Settings.
Tap the Play button on the Find My Device screen.
expected: A warning dialog appears that matches the Figma design specifications (correct layout, text, colors, fonts, and button styling).
